personality_one_liner: A friendly, responsive, and bubbly messaging space driven by warm cream surfaces and vibrant coral accents.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing. Bubble containers need ample internal padding. Do not cramp elements; let the layout breathe.

do's: Apply to the bottom tab bar and sticky chat header when messages scroll beneath it
Use as a backdrop for the floating 'New Chat' action button
dont's: Never apply glass to individual chat bubbles or list items
Do not blur inputs or form fields

screens.name: Login

states.error: Standard error toast/modal with retry button

screens.layout: Minimalist centered layout with a large, bubbly brand logo, a welcoming heading (Fredoka), and a pill-shaped Google login button anchored in the thumb zone. Background uses the warm surface color with a subtle, brandTertiary gradient near the top.

screens.name: ChatList
screens.purpose: Main landing screen showing all active conversations (1-on-1 and groups)

states.empty: Illustration with a text 'No chats yet. Start a conversation!' and a prominent 'New Chat' CTA.
states.error: Error banner at top; list showing cached items if offline.

screens.layout: Vertical scroll layout (FlatList). Each row has a circular avatar, Name, Preview text, and a right-aligned timestamp + brandPrimary unread dot if applicable. Floating Action Button (FAB) at bottom-right for 'New Chat'. Navigation header is glass over scrolling list.

screens.name: ChatRoom
screens.purpose: The actual conversation interface for messaging

states.empty: Subtle background watermark/illustration indicating start of chat.
states.error: Red error icon next to failed messages with tap-to-retry.

screens.layout: Sticky glass header with back button, user/group avatar, name, and online status. ScrollView/FlatList (inverted) for messages. Right-aligned bubbles in brandPrimary for 'Me', Left-aligned bubbles in surfaceSecondary for 'Other'. Message compose bar at bottom (surfaceTertiary) with rounded text input, attachment icon, and a prominent send button.

screens.name: NewChat
screens.purpose: Search and select a contact to start a new chat or group
screens.layout: Modal or Stack screen with a sticky search bar at the top. Below is a vertical list of contacts. Multi-select checkboxes appear if 'New Group' is toggled.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Manage user settings, avatar, and logout
screens.layout: Large centered avatar at the top. Form fields (Name, Status) in surfaceTertiary pill shapes. A 'Sign Out' button at the bottom of the scroll view.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor icons with 'fill' for active tabs and 'regular' for inactive tabs.
Chat bubbles must follow strict alignment: Right for 'Me' (Coral brandPrimary), Left for 'Other' (White surfaceSecondary).
Never rely on color alone for sender differentiation. Ensure visual alignment is obvious.
Add a gradient scrim over the image attachment previews if text/metadata needs to be overlaid.
When a user presses 'Send', trigger the 'impactLight' haptic feedback.
Ensure the Message Composer is inside a KeyboardAvoidingView with padding so it floats cleanly above the keyboard.
Implement WebSockets for real-time delivery and offline message queuing. The UI should reflect offline state (e.g. gray clock icon for queued, tick for sent, double tick for read).
